name: portfolio-mern
description: Full-stack portfolio with React, Vite, Node, Express, MongoDB

scripts.install:all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix server --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build --prefix client && mkdir -p dist && cp -r client/dist/. dist/
